revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-2-450

Alternative term: Timer Coder (U.S.A.)

The central control mechanism, either electrical, electronic or mechanical, by means of which the transmission schedule of the radio beacon is determined, and the characteristic code of the station is generated.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Clock coder (G.B.)}}
